'''gadhuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrisol|fibrisol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrisol|fibrisol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gadhuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || gædhivith || gædhivij || gædhivish || gædhivi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || gadhudhuvuth || gadhudhuvuj || gadhudhuvush || gadhudhuvu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || gadhuvuth || gadhuvuj || gadhuvush || gadhuvu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || gadhufvufth || gadhufvufj || gadhufvufsh || gadhufvuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || gadhuvuthu || gadhuvuju || gadhuvushu || gadhuvuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || gadhuvuth || gadhuvuj || gadhuvush || gadhuvu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || gadhuvuthul || gadhuvujul || gadhuvushul || gadhuvukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || gadhuvuuthuthu || gadhuvuujuju || gadhuvuushushu || gadhuvuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || gadhuvuthun || gadhuvujun || gadhuvushun || gadhuvukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || gadhuvuthuoro || gadhuvujuoro || gadhuvushuoro || gadhuvukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
